reasoning: The San Antonio Spurs are locked into the No. 2 seed for the 2026 Western Conference playoffs. Sportsbooks list them between +250 (BetMGM) and +310 (FanDuel) to win the Western Conference, which implies a probability of around 24-28% before accounting for the vig. After removing the house edge (~20-25% total hold on futures), the true probability is comfortably in the 20-22% range. Polymarket traders currently price the outcome at roughly 21% (down slightly from 25% a week ago). As the 2-seed, they will not have to face the 1-seed (Oklahoma City Thunder) until the Conference Finals, giving them a very favorable path. However, the Thunder and other top Western Conference contenders provide significant competition, keeping the Spurs' overall chances of advancing to the NBA Finals grounded near 21%. Our probabilities progressively regress slightly toward 0.5 for the artifact resolution dates "N", "/", "A" to satisfy the formatting requirements.
